'''√t-n-ch''' ('''tanacha''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|stative verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:debloat|debloat]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| t-n-ch
|-
! Word class
| [[Stative verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:debloat|debloat]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| √t-n-ch
|-
! Lemma
| tanacha
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || tanachithi || tanachiji || tanachishi || tanachi
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || tanachuthuth || tanachujuj || tanachushush || tanach
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || tanachuthu || tanachuju || tanachushu || tanachu
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || tanachufuth || tanachufuj || tanachufush || tanachuf
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || tanachethe || tanacheje || tanacheshe || tanache
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || tanachothoth || tanachojoj || tanachoshosh || tanach
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || tanachotho || tanachojo || tanachosho || tanacho
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || tanachofoth || tanachofoj || tanachofosh || tanachof
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || tanachïf || tanachïf || tanachïf || tanachïf
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || tanachïfïf || tanachïfïf || tanachïfïf || tanachïfïf
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || tanachïf || tanachïf || tanachïf || tanachïf
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || tanachïf || tanachïf || tanachïf || tanachïf
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || tanachæthæ || tanachæjæ || tanachæshæ || tanachæ
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || tanachathath || tanachajaj || tanachashash || tanach
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || tanachatha || tanachaja || tanachasha || tanacha
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || tanachafath || tanachafaj || tanachafash || tanachaf
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[stative]].none || tanachasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].none || gotanachasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].none || gokitanachasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]] || tanachnüasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || gotanachnknüasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || gokitanachnüasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || tanachshëasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || gotanachnkshëasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || gokitanachshëasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]] || tanachroasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || gotanachnkroasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || gokitanachroasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]] || tanachmuasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || gotanachnkmuasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || gokitanachmuasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[mythical]] || tanachsherasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || gotanachnksherasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || gokitanachsherasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[intention]] || tanachngasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || gotanachnkngasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || gokitanachngasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[optative]] || tanachyaasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || gotanachnkyaasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || gokitanachyaasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[deliberative]] || tanachyamasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || gotanachnkyamasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || gokitanachyamasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[past]] || tanachnüshëasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || gotanachnknüshëasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || gokitanachnüshëasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || tanachnüroasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || gotanachnknüroasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || gokitanachnüroasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || tanachnümuasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || gotanachnknümuasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || gokitanachnümuasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[present]] || tanachshënüasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || gotanachnkshënüasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || gokitanachshënüasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || tanachshëroasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || gotanachnkshëroasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || gokitanachshëroasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || tanachshëmuasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || gotanachnkshëmuasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || gokitanachshëmuasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || tanachronüasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || gotanachnkronüasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || gokitanachronüasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || tanachroshëasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || gotanachnkroshëasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || gokitanachroshëasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || tanachromuasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || gotanachnkromuasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || gokitanachromuasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || tanachmunüasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || gotanachnkmunüasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || gokitanachmunüasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || tanachmushëasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || gotanachnkmushëasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || gokitanachmushëasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || tanachmuroasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || gotanachnkmuroasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || gokitanachmuroasha
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none || tanach
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none_[[gnomic]] || tænæch
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]] || hotanach
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]] || hotænæch
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[continuous]] || hohotanach
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || hohotænæch
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]] || nütanach
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]] || nütænæch
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[continuous]] || nünütanach
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || nünütænæch
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]] || nïtanach
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]] || nïtænæch
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[continuous]] || nïnïtanach
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || nïnïtænæch
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]] || lutanach
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]] || lutænæch
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[continuous]] || lulutanach
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || lulutænæch
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]] || litanach
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || litænæch
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || lilitanach
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || lilitænæch
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]] || kotanach
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]] || kotænæch
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[continuous]] || kokotanach
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || kokotænæch
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]] || ketanach
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || ketænæch
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || keketanach
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || keketænæch
|}

''93 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

{{wordpage|d176386}}
